menu.name: Hadero Macchiato
menu.description: Double espresso shot with velvety micro-foam, layered in traditional Ethiopian style.

menu.name: Traditional Jebena Coffee
menu.description: Freshly roasted, ground, and slow-brewed in a traditional clay Jebena. Served with popcorn.

menu.name: Hadero Special Blend
menu.description: Our signature premium medium-dark roast coffee, freshly brewed and full of flavor.

menu.name: Caramel Cafe Latte
menu.description: Smooth espresso, steamed milk, and a decadent drizzle of caramel syrup.

menu.name: Iced Hazelnut Cold Brew
menu.description: Hadero cold brew steeped for 16 hours, infused with sweet hazelnut and poured over ice.

menu.name: Espresso-Infused Coffee Cake
menu.description: Moist cake with a strong espresso ribbon, topped with cinnamon-brown sugar streusel and walnuts.

menu.name: Hadero Club Sandwich
menu.description: Double-decker sandwich with roasted chicken, fresh avocado, tomato, cheese, and mustard aioli.

menu.name: Crispy Beef Sambusa
menu.description: Three golden-brown crispy pastries filled with spiced minced beef, green chilies, and onions.

cash.name: Cash on Delivery
cash.description: Pay cash directly to the waiter after they serve your order.
